original: an obsidian ring piercing, tipped with savicite
context: <<POS:07394327>> ase(e.longName)),e.description='an obsidian ring piercing, tipped with savicite'

original: A simplistic looking obsidian ring piercing with a small clump of savicite melded into the fitting. While archaic in design, it is tipped with savicite, a highly sought after commodity. The psionic emissions from the raw jewels will likely leave you feeling a bit randy if worn.
